risk_notes: DC-003 test-engineer tests: plugin-transport.test.ts and plugin-transport-bridge.test.ts were repaired from disconnected fakes to production-boundary tests. Verify they stay that way.
platform-config.ts now has live consumers (DC-001). No longer dead code.
Pre-existing 126+33 typecheck errors remain. These are NOT from this session.
pluginOff fix uses _pluginListeners Map with String(handler) as key. If a handler function is garbage-collected and recreated identically, the key could collide. Low risk for practical plugin usage.
The roadmap tool shows PG-001 at 45% even though the handoff data says schema is complete. The remaining 55% is the application-layer import switching.
DC-003 IPC channel name verification done: PLUGIN_SEND/PLUGIN_INVOKE/PLUGIN_PUSH confirmed matching across all 4 layers (channels, contract, preload, handlers).
Red-team findings about IPC origin validation and channel allowlist are existing system issues, not regressions from this phase.
